# meok-iata-dgr-air-cargo-mcp

> IATA DGR air-cargo compliance — ICAO Annex 18, IATA DGR 66, lithium-battery PI 965-970, Shipper's Declaration §8, acceptance checklist §9, state + operator variations. For forwarders + EV-recall carriers shipping by air. By MEOK AI Labs.

MCP server by MEOK AI Labs. Framework: fastmcp. Transport: stdio.

## Tools
- classify_air_dangerous_good
- check_lithium_battery_air_transport
- check_state_of_charge_air
- generate_iata_shippers_declaration
- check_passenger_vs_cargo_aircraft
- validate_un_specification_packaging
- check_country_variations
- prepare_iata_acceptance_check

## Install
```
pip install meok-iata-dgr-air-cargo-mcp
```

## Links
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/meok-iata-dgr-air-cargo-mcp/
- Docs: https://meok.ai
